name: vinuni_underspecified_targets
description: TARGET (roadmap #2, D4): a required slot (term / program) is missing and multiple candidates exist. Desired behavior = clarify-or-default-and-state, NOT a conf-0 degrade. Behavior probe — required_facts are loose markers that a clarifying OR assumption-stating answer would contain (a term word, a program word, or an explicit 'which/depends'); a bare degrade contains none. NOTE: clarification was previously deferred to the teammate UX merge — confirm scope before building D4. Move to data/eval/golden/ when D4 lands.
